steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the function of the underlined definition of convergent evolution. The rest of the passage discusses how different research teams investigated that phenomenon, so the definition must be setting it up.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• "It provides examples of how a phenomenon was studied by scientists in the field before Green and Extavour's study.": The underlined portion is a definition, not examples of studies. ✗
  • "It gives a basic description of a phenomenon that is central to the discussion that follows.": The underlined phrase defines convergent evolution in plain terms before the passage examines how researchers investigated it. That is exactly a basic description of the central phenomenon. ✓
  • "It clarifies a concept that the author implies was unclear in the studies mentioned in the text.": The passage never suggests the scientists were confused about what convergent evolution means — the definition is for the reader, not a correction of the studies. ✗
  • "It introduces a method of scientific analysis that is discussed in greater detail later in the text.": Convergent evolution is a phenomenon, not a method of analysis. ✗
That matches the correct answer — B is correct.
